testcase.name: add_eventFailure_isNonFatal
testcase.system-out: 03:36:19.656 [main] ERROR com.bookplus.catalog.application.usecase.AddReviewUseCaseImpl -- Failed to publish ReviewAddedEvent for book 110d911c-8d0d-4692-bbaf-9258077c5f82: Kafka down 03:36:19.657 [main] INFO com.bookplus.catalog.application.usecase.AddReviewUseCaseImpl -- Review added: reviewId=b0815d82-2515-4e7c-a710-9c5e11f7b086 bookId=110d911c-8d0d-4692-bbaf-9258077c5f82 userId=user-1
